<script nonce="EHYbm/HjkOskNmSpiSBK8w==">


document.documentElement.setAttribute("lang", "en");
document.documentElement.setAttribute("class", " is-not-mobile");

dojoConfig = {
has: {
"intuit-embedded": false,
"qbo-layers": true,
"qbo-mac": false,
"qbo-win": false,
"qbo-partner": "NONE",
"app-channel": "NONE",
"qbo-partner-channel-mac": false,
"qbo-error-logging": true,
"qbo-error-logging-url-patterns": "^(https?:\/\/[^\/]*qbo[^\/]*\.intuit\.com|https?:\/\/[^\/]*qbo[^\/]*\.intuitcdn\.net|https?:\/\/[^\/]*uxfabric[^\/]*\.intuitcdn\.net|https:\/\/[^\/]*plugin[^\/]*\.intuitcdn\.net)(:[0-9]+)?\/",
"qbo-error-logging-ttime": 60000,
"qbo-error-logging-tcount": 100,
"qbo-manual-update-status-check-frequency": 6000,
"qbo-manual-update-max-num-status-checks": 500
},
isDebug: 0,
locale: "en-us",
async: 1,
dojoBlankHtmlUrl: "https://plugin.intuitcdn.net/sbg-web-shell-ui/13.23.1/bower_components/dojo/resources/blank.html",
paths: {
"lodash-no-global": "https://plugin.intuitcdn.net/lodash-no-global/3.10.1/dist/lodash.min"
}
};

dojoConfig.has['i18n-custom-labels'] = function () { return window.appContext.token; };

var overrideMap = {};
var sbgRuntimeConfig;


// Although this property is called __coreAppInternal, it is also used in non-CoreApp flows.
window.__coreAppInternal = {};

window.__coreAppInternal.__configureRuntimePromise = new Promise((resolve) => {
// This will be called by the configureRuntime function to signal that the runtime has been configured.
window.__coreAppInternal.onRuntimeConfigurationComplete = () => {
resolve();
};
// This will be used in the preloadAssets template to wait for the runtime to be configured
// before resolving URLs of preload assets.
window.__coreAppInternal.hasRuntimeBeenConfigured = () => {
return window.__coreAppInternal.__configureRuntimePromise;
};
});

window.__coreAppInternal.__firstPageLoadPluginsLoadedPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {
// This will be called in the last insertion point template to signal that the first page load plugins have been loaded.
window.__coreAppInternal.onFirstPageLoadPluginsLoaded = () => {
resolve();
};
// This will be used in the preBoot function to wait for the first page load plugins to be loaded
// before the web shell adapter is loaded in sbg-web-shell-ui.
window.__coreAppInternal.haveFirstPageLoadPluginsBeenLoaded = () => {
return window.__coreAppInternal.__firstPageLoadPluginsLoadedPromise;
};
});

window.__coreAppInternal.__postLoadPluginsLoadedPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {
// This will be called in the last insertion point template to signal that the post load plugins have been loaded.
window.__coreAppInternal.onPostLoadPluginsLoaded = (postLoadPlugins) => {
resolve(postLoadPlugins);
};
// This will be used by qbo-web-app-ui to get the post load plugins instead of making a call to v1/plugins (or IPPAppEntitlements)
// which refetches all plugin configurations.
window.__coreAppInternal.getPostLoadPlugins = () => {
return window.__coreAppInternal.__postLoadPluginsLoadedPromise;
}
});

function setupLegacyAliases() {
Object.defineProperty(window, "appContext", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.qboContext = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.qboContext;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});

Object.defineProperty(window, "qbo", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.qboContext = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.qboContext;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});

Object.defineProperty(window, "neoContext", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.qboContext = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.qboContext;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});

Object.defineProperty(window.__shellInternal.qboContext, "i18nToken", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.qboContext.token = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.qboContext.token;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});

Object.defineProperty(window.__shellInternal.qboContext, "pluginsInfo", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});

Object.defineProperty(window.__shellInternal.qboContext, "featureFlags", {
"set": function(newValue) {
window.__shellInternal.featureFlags = newValue;
},
"get": function() {
return window.__shellInternal.featureFlags;
},
"configurable": true,
"enumerable": true
});
}


function bootScript(runtime) {
return new Promise((resolve) => {

require({cache: {}});
var configPath = "shell/applications/default/config";
performanceApi.mark("DOJO_JS_PARSE_START");
require(["shell/base/loader", configPath], function(loader, config) {
// Track the time it took to parse the dojo.js file
performanceApi.measure("DOJO_JS_PARSE", "DOJO_JS_PARSE_START");
performanceApi.mark("SBG_LOADER_LOAD_START");

loader.load({
useLayers: true,
storageSecondaryKey: "4569153542473496",
storagePrimaryKey: "9341455197265379",
layers: config.getLayers(runtime)
}, function (err, layers) {
performanceApi.measure("SBG_LOADER_LOAD", "SBG_LOADER_LOAD_START");
// Track when the boot layers (boot.js and css) are loaded
performanceApi.measure("SBG_BOOT_LAYERS_LOAD", "fetchStart");

// Wait for all the plugin configs, feature flags and authz decisions to be loaded in the last insertion point
// before we load the web shell adapter in sbg-web-shell-ui.
window.__coreAppInternal.haveFirstPageLoadPluginsBeenLoaded().then(() => {
performanceApi.measure("WAIT_FOR_FIRST_PAGE_LOAD_PLUGINS_COMPLETE", "fetchStart");
// This loads the web shell adapter in sbg-web-shell-ui so all the data we've deferred loading
// in the last insertion point needs to be loaded before getAppHandler is called.
config.getAppHandler(null, () => {
performanceApi.measure("PREBOOT_COMPLETE", "fetchStart");
resolve();
})(err, layers);
});
});
});
});
}

window.__middlewareConfig = {

preBoot: () => {
var runtime = {
isVO: "" || false,
flags: false,
embedded: false,
};

return bootScript(runtime);
},

configureRuntime: (runtime) => {
window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo = Object.assign(window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo, window.__shellInternal.qboContext.pluginsInfo);
setupLegacyAliases();

window.shell = {"errorLoggingUrlPatterns":"^(https?:\\/\\/[^\\/]*qbo[^\\/]*\\.intuit\\.com|https?:\\/\\/[^\\/]*qbo[^\\/]*\\.intuitcdn\\.net|https?:\\/\\/[^\\/]*uxfabric[^\\/]*\\.intuitcdn\\.net|https:\\/\\/[^\\/]*plugin[^\\/]*\\.intuitcdn\\.net)(:[0-9]+)?\\/","errorLoggingEnabled":true,"errorLoggingTTime":60000,"errorLoggingTCount":100,"manualUpdateStatusCheckFrequency":6000,"manualUpdateMaxNumStatusChecks":500,"version":"5.356.1","webpack":false,"includeFlags":false,"appChannel":"NONE","companyPartner":"NONE","accessDeniedPages":[48],"isPayrollFirstCompany":false,"hiddenPages":[],"macChannelPartner":false,"qboMac":false,"qboWin":false,"staticBaseUrl":"https://plugin.intuitcdn.net/sbg-web-shell-ui/13.23.1","websdkSrc":"https://plugin.intuitcdn.net/websdk/1.10.16/websdk.segment.min.js","locale":"en-us","defaultHTMLClass":" is-not-mobile","browserOS":"","isPolyfillServiceEnabled":false,"polyfillServiceParams":"features=default,Number.isInteger,Number.isNaN,String.prototype.repeat,String.prototype.endsWith,String.prototype.includes,Symbol,Symbol.iterator,String.prototype.startsWith,Array.prototype.find,Promise,Object.assign,Object.keys.Array.prototype.includes,Array.prototype.findIndex,Map,fetch&flags=gated","cspEnableNonce":true,"useLayers":true,"isDebug":0,"environment":"prod","zoomEnabled":true,"appDynamicsRUM":{"enabled":false,"src":"https://cdn.appdynamics.com/adrum/adrum-latest.js","rumAppKey":"AD-AAB-AAE-JXD"},"showAppStoreMeta":false,"loadAnimationEnabled":true,"featureFlagPluginId":"sbg-web-shell-ui","clientUtilsHost":"https://zion.qbo.intuit.com","qbo_browser_auth_key":"Intuit_APIKey intuit_apikey=0d9d2925-eec0-45e9-b24a-b267b331c922","cspEnforced":true,"lang":"en","liteShell":false,"disableDojoSupport":false};

const appFMappings = runtime.map['*'];
const qboMappings = require.rawConfig.map['*'];

Object.keys(qboMappings).forEach((mapKey) => {
if (qboMappings[mapKey] === "APPFDEFAULT") {
qboMappings[mapKey] = appFMappings[mapKey] || mapKey;
}
});

delete qboMappings["web-shell-core"];
Object.keys(appFMappings).filter((key) => key.indexOf("web-shell-core/") == 0).forEach((key) => {
qboMappings[key] = appFMappings[key];
});

require.rawConfig.map['*'] = qboMappings;

runtime.map = require.rawConfig.map;



runtime.map["*"]["morpheus/widgets/BaseWidget"] = "@appfabric/web-shell-core/widgets/BaseWidget";
delete runtime.paths["web-shell-core"];

// Only add missing WPR packages to avoid messing up existing package definitions from shell-ui.profile
const rawConfigPackageSet = new Set(require.rawConfig.packages.map(p => p.name));
const missingRuntimePackages = runtime.packages.filter(runtimePackage => !rawConfigPackageSet.has(runtimePackage.name));
runtime.packages = require.rawConfig.packages;
runtime.packages.push(...missingRuntimePackages);

runtime.packages.forEach(p => {
if(p.main && p.main.match(/\.js$/)) {
// Dojo loader adds .js automatically
p.main = p.main.replace(/\.js$/, "");
}

if (p.location) {
if (p.location.indexOf("../") > -1) {
p.location = p.location.replace("../", `${window.shell.staticBaseUrl}/`);
} else if (p.name === "dojo") {
p.location = `${window.shell.staticBaseUrl}/dojo`;
}
if (runtime.paths[p.name]) {
runtime.paths[p.name] = p.location;
}
}
});

if (window.qbo.environment == "dev" || window.qbo.environment == "qa" || window.qbo.environment == "e2e") {
if (runtime.paths["react-dom"] && runtime.paths["react"]) {
runtime.paths["react-dom"] = runtime.paths["react-dom"].replace('min', 'development')
runtime.paths["react"] = runtime.paths["react"].replace('min', 'development')
}
}

// Use the one that's in sbg-web-shell-ui.
delete runtime.paths["shell/lib/utils"];

sbgRuntimeConfig = runtime;
performanceApi.measure("CONFIGURE_RUNTIME_COMPLETE", "fetchStart");
window.__coreAppInternal.onRuntimeConfigurationComplete();
return runtime;
}
};
</script>

<script nonce="EHYbm/HjkOskNmSpiSBK8w==">
function addPreload(assetUrl, type) {
const preloadLink = document.createElement("link");
preloadLink.href = assetUrl;
preloadLink.rel = "preload";
preloadLink.as = type;
preloadLink.crossOrigin = "anonymous";

document.head.appendChild(preloadLink);
}

function preloadPlugin(pluginName) {
const plugin = window.__shellInternal &&
window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo &&
window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo.plugins &&
window.__shellInternal.pluginsInfo.plugins[pluginName];

if (plugin && plugin.baseSourceUrl && plugin.entry) {
let preloadUrl = `${plugin.baseSourceUrl}/${plugin.entry}.js`;
if (plugin.entry.includes('{locale}')) {
if (!window?.appContext?.locale) {
// Do not preload in case of SSR or missing locale.
return;
}
preloadUrl = `${plugin.baseSourceUrl}/${plugin.entry.replace('{locale}', window.appContext.locale)}`;
}
addPreload(preloadUrl, "script");
}
}

window.__coreAppInternal.hasRuntimeBeenConfigured().then(() => {
performanceApi.measure("WAIT_FOR_CONFIGURE_RUNTIME_COMPLETE", "fetchStart");
const preloadModules = [
"@appfabric/web-shell-core/application/appdelegates/actions/types",
"@appfabric/web-shell-core/application/appdelegates/BaseAppDelegate",
"@appfabric/web-shell-core/application/CorePlugin",
...(
window.__shellInternal.environment !== "prod" ? [
// We map these to their development versions in the base template so we need to preload the
// correct assets because web-shell only preloads the non-development versions.
"react",
"react-dom",
] : []
),
"react-intl",
"@sbg/analytics-lib",
"classnames",
"ua-parser-js",
"mustache",
"hui/hui",
"@ids-ts/badge",
"@ids-ts/button",
"@ids-ts/inline-validation-message",
"@ids-ts/typography",
"@ids-ts/icon-container",
"styled-components",
"shell/appReadyDeps",
// This is in appReadyDeps but for some reason a separate network request is made for it.
"shell/lib/intuit-analytics/intuitAnalytics"
];

preloadModules.forEach((module) => {
const assetUrl = Array.isArray(module) ? `${window.require.toUrl(module[0])}/${module[1]}.js` : `${window.require.toUrl(module)}.js`;
addPreload(assetUrl, "script");
});

// This can probably be done earlier with the preload links determined from the middleware as long as the locale is
// available at that point.
const preloadPlugins = [
"qbo-navigation-widgets-ui",
"variability-sb-ext"
]

preloadPlugins.forEach((pluginId) => {
preloadPlugin(pluginId)
});
})

</script>

ran into a problem with this employee’s bank account","fr":"Le virement automatique n'a pas été pris en compte pour ce chèque de paie."},"message":{"en":"We ran into a problem with this employee’s bank account and couldn’t pay them via direct deposit. Watch your email for details on when we’ll return these funds to your bank account. Be sure to void this check and either create a new one after correcting the employee’s bank account information, or set the pay method to paper check.","fr":"Nous n'avons pas pu payer cet employé par virement automatique en raison d'une erreur liée à son compte bancaire. Vous recevrez un e-mail vous indiquant la date à laquelle nous vous rembourserons les fonds sur votre compte bancaire. N'oubliez pas: vous devez annuler ce chèque et en <script nonce="EHYbm/HjkOskNmSpiSBK8w==">
window.__shellJsonData = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('shell-json-data').textContent);
window.__shellInternal.featureFlags = window.__shellJsonData.featureFlags;
window.__shellInternal.applicationContext.authzDecisions = window.__shellJsonData.authzDecisions;
performanceApi.measure("FIRST_PAGE_LOAD_PLUGINS_LOAD", "fetchStart");
window.__coreAppInternal.onFirstPageLoadPluginsLoaded();
</script>


<script nonce="EHYbm/HjkOskNmSpiSBK8w==">

performanceApi.measure("POST_LOAD_PLUGINS_LOAD", "fetchStart");
window.__coreAppInternal.onPostLoadPluginsLoaded(postLoadPlugins);
</script>
